events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario involves equipment bonding on a production floor, with isolated metal parts observed while work is in progress. This is a safety hazard - isolated metal parts that should be bonded can become energized and pose shock/electrocution risk. NEC 250.104 requires bonding of metal parts, and 250.30 covers bonding for separately derived systems.

This is a fail condition - isolated metal parts in equipment bonding is non-compliant and a safety hazard.
